LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RICHARD WOOSTER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE DEFAULT IS SET ASIDE AND DEFENDANT RICHARD WOOSTER HAS LEAVE TO FILE AN ANSWER TO PLAINTIFFS' UNVERIFIED COMPLAINT. THE ANSWER SHALL BE FILED WITHIN 10 DAYS AFTER ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. LAW AND MOTION 302, THE LAW OFFICES OF ANDREY KALININ'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF LONG NGUYEN IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. COUNSEL DID NOT TIMELY FILE PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE MOTION WITH THE COURT. "PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE MOVING PAPERS MUST BE FILED NO LATER THAN FIVE COURT DAYS BEFORE THE TIME APPOINTED FOR THE HEARING." (CRC 3.1300(C).) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANDREY KALININ, TEL. NO. 386-8136, MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE LAW OFFICES OF ANDREY KALININ'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF LONG NGUYEN IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. Counsel did not timely file proof of service of the motion with the Court. "Proof of service of the moving papers must be filed no later than five court days before the time appointed for the hearing." (CRC 3.1300(c).) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RICHARD WOOSTER's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is granted. No opposition filed. The default is set aside and Defendant Richard Wooster has leave to file an answer to Plaintiffs' unverified complaint. The answer shall be filed within 10 days after entry of this order. order signed after hearing. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
